title: 'Obsession with our country's most cherished structure': Trump reacts to White House shooting
summary_full: US President Donald Trump praised the Secret Service and law enforcement for their swift action in neutralizing a gunman near the White House. The suspect, identified as Nasire Best, was killed after firing at agents. Trump highlighted the incident's importance for future presidential security, referencing a previous security breach.
